rule_metadata.name: dirty_pipe
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'dirty-pipe' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule dirty_pipe
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'dirty-pipe' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "dirty-pipe"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\.\/exploit\s\/etc\/passwd\s1\s.{0,1000}cat\s\/etc\/passwd/
		$string2 = "/0xIronGoat/dirty-pipe" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
